title: dichilus reflexus
intro: Dichilus reflexus, also known as the reflexed dichilus, is a plant species in the family Rubiaceae. It has been used traditionally for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of various health issues. The plant is known to have anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory infections, as well as promote wound healing. Dichilus reflexus can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction for its medicinal benefits.
